attributes.action: Prevent councils running meetings to do with international affairs.
attributes.additional_details:
Councils waste too much time and resources dealing with international affairs/conflicts when they should be putting the time and resources in looking after their Borough only.

It is parliament/governments responsibility to deal with international affairs and not local councils.

It is not a councils responsibility to ease conflict in other countries because they have residents that have family there. Their job is their Borough and their Borough only not international, stop wasting resources.
attributes.background: Stop councils from wasting time with international affairs/conflicts. A council should only be looking after the Borough it is designated for and not wasting time or resources dealing with international affairs and  to focus on their Borough only.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action. 
 
We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do, including what specific types of business you mean by your reference to meetings to do with international affairs. 

We also can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for. It is generally a matter for councils to make determinations relating to their meetings.
